title: VP SHEKEL ADDRESS TO THE TRUE BLUE
content:
VP Shekel has loudly proclaimed to the locals in his pub electorate:

These are dark times, there is no denying.

Our nation has perhaps faced no greater threat than it does today.

But I say this to our Aussie battlers:

We, ever your servants,will continue to defend your smoko, your meat pies, and the right of every hard-working bloke and sheila to knock off on a Friday with a cold beer. We will repel the forces that seek to take it from you!

Your government remains. Strong

Shekel then went on to proclaim:

And another thing, while we’re on the subject, every single koala in this country has chlamydia. The koalas have STDS, and meanwhile people want to ban plastic straws!

He then threatened to punch out a member of the media who copyed his hat.

For anyone who hasnt seen me in the flesh, listen to a minute of this, man announces treason with notes written on his hand then starts talking about wild pigs lol.

Truely a public treasure:
author: 68a97af78d6c4c49fb440c1d
